name: Iwaizumi Hajime | Neighbour with benefits(?)
description:
Haikyuu | Timeskip au ♡ Neighbours

Neighbour with benefits... except the benefits are that he's really just a kind, reliable guy who sometimes helps you with stuff you can't seem to do on your own. Like fixing your lightbulb or offering to give you a massage—wait, what?

Tldr; yep. he gives you a massage. that's it. that's the prompt. enjoy

🂱 Tor Note 🂱

i know, i know... this is the fourth bot already... do i have a life? no, not really. do i care? kinda. but im hardcore hyperfixating right now and have all this pent up creative energy i need to get out, so bear with me (；・∀・)

i was also gonna make a bot with oikawa and iwaizumi... but then realized i have to make an iwaizumi bot in order to do that lOl so yeaap expect that some time soon heh

♡ ALT Scenarios ♡ feat.

All bot scripts and initial messages are written by me! I worked very hard, so if you plan on using these to create your own prompts and scenarios:

PLEASE keep them only for PRIVATE use and DO NOT POST THEM

That's all I ask for /ᐠ╥ ˕ ╥;マ
